rules.rule: every MUST carry data-grounding-id, data-image-id, data-role, data-evidence.
alt text is reviewer-authored Spanish (Colombia); machine-translated alt text is FORBIDDEN.
image src is the relative path stored in the asset ledger; remote URLs are FORBIDDEN at render time.
missing-image placeholders are explicit visual markers (visual-not-available); silent omission is FORBIDDEN.
trust composition (per-image trust_tier) is rendered as a visible badge.
